heading: Effect on existing laws
label: 421d Effect on existing laws
text: Except as otherwise provided in sections 421a to 421h of this title, the provisions of the Federal reclamation laws, and Acts amendatory thereto, are continued in full force and effect.
notes: Amendments1972— reenacted section without change.Pub. L. 92–487
amendments: Amendments1972— reenacted section without change.Pub. L. 92–487
